title: Neural HRSM State Space: Controlled Organizational Memory in Spontaneous Allen Neuropixels Dynamics
description: Code, analysis scripts, derived summaries, figures, and manuscript build pipeline for a six-session HRSM state-space analysis of controlled organizational memory in spontaneous Allen Visual Coding Neuropixels population dynamics. The archived release corresponds to the strict-v2 manuscript snapshot and includes scripts for HDF5-based Allen NWB extraction, HRSM proxy construction, shuffled-lag memory controls, variance/autocorrelation residualization, lag-ablation audits, ripeness summaries, and manuscript compilation.
